info.name: Get meta information of the account

items.docs: Get meta information of the account

params.name: provider
params.description: The provider of the results to fetch

params.name: origin_owner_id
params.description: The origin owner identifier of the results to fetch

params.name: page
params.description: The page number of the results to fetch

params.name: page_size
params.description: The number of results per page

params.name: raw
params.description: Indicates that the raw request result is returned

params.name: fields
params.description: The comma separated list of fields to return in the response (if empty, all fields are returned)

params.name: sync_token
params.description: The sync token to select the only updated results

params.name: updated_after
params.description: Use a string with a date to only select results updated after that given date

params.name: proxy
params.description: Query parameters that can be used to pass through parameters to the underlying provider request by surrounding them with "proxy" key

params.description: The sync token to select the only updated results

params.name: updated_after
params.description: Use a string with a date to only select results updated after that given date

params.name: proxy
params.description: Query parameters that can be used to pass through parameters to the underlying provider request by surrounding them with "proxy" key
